steps.name: Resolve immutable release source
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail

event_name="${GITHUB_EVENT_NAME}"
source_event="${event_name}"

if [[ "${event_name}" == "workflow_run" ]]; then
  if [[ "${{ github.event.workflow_run.head_branch }}" != "main" ]]; then
    echo "::error title=Invalid release branch::workflow_run source must come from main." >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ "${{ github.event.workflow_run.head_repository.full_name }}" != "${{ github.repository }}" ]]; then
    echo "::error title=Invalid release source::workflow_run source repository must match the current repository." >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  source_sha="${{ github.event.workflow_run.head_sha }}"
elif [[ "${event_name}" == "workflow_dispatch" ]]; then
  if [[ "${GITHUB_REF}" != "refs/heads/main" ]]; then
    echo "::error title=Invalid release branch::workflow_dispatch must run from main." >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  source_sha="${GITHUB_SHA}"
else
  echo "::error title=Unsupported release event::Only workflow_run and workflow_dispatch are supported." >&2
  exit 1
fi

if ! [[ "${source_sha}" =~ ^[0-9a-f]{40}$ ]]; then
  echo "::error title=Invalid release SHA::Resolved release source is not a full commit SHA." >&2
  exit 1
fi

echo "source_event=${source_event}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
echo "source_ref=${source_sha}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
echo "source_sha=${source_sha}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

steps.name: Mask configured secrets
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
for key in AUTH_MFA_ENCRYPTION_KEY DATABASE_URL JOB_HMAC_GLOBAL_SECRET REDIS_URL RENDER_STAGING_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL SENTRY_DSN SESSION_SECRET STRIPE_SECRET_KEY STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET; do
  value="${!key:-}"
  if [[ -n "${value}" ]]; then
    echo "::add-mask::${value}"
  fi
done

steps.name: Validate required staging configuration
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail

required_secrets=(
  RENDER_STAGING_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL
  DATABASE_URL
  REDIS_URL
  SESSION_SECRET
  JOB_HMAC_GLOBAL_SECRET
  AUTH_MFA_ENCRYPTION_KEY
  STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
  STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
  SENTRY_DSN
)

required_vars=(
  API_CORS_ORIGINS
  WEB_BASE_URL
  NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL
  NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
  NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN
  NEXT_PUBLIC_CSP_REPORT_ONLY
  REQUIRE_SECURE_COOKIES
  STRIPE_SUCCESS_URL
  STRIPE_CANCEL_URL
  BILLING_EXPORT_STORAGE_MODE
)

missing=()

for key in "${required_secrets[@]}"; do
  if [[ -z "${!key:-}" ]]; then
    missing+=("${key} (secret)")
  fi
done

for key in "${required_vars[@]}"; do
  if [[ -z "${!key:-}" ]]; then
    missing+=("${key} (variable)")
  fi
done

if (( ${#missing[@]} > 0 )); then
  printf 'Missing required staging configuration:\n' >&2
  printf ' - %s\n' "${missing[@]}" >&2
  echo "::error title=Missing staging configuration::Configure missing keys in Environment staging (Secrets/Variables)." >&2
  exit 1
fi


if [[ "${BILLING_EXPORT_STORAGE_MODE}" != "local" && "${BILLING_EXPORT_STORAGE_MODE}" != "s3" ]]; then
  echo "::error title=Invalid variable::BILLING_EXPORT_STORAGE_MODE must be local or s3." >&2
  exit 1
fi

if [[ "${BILLING_EXPORT_STORAGE_MODE}" == "s3" && -z "${BILLING_EXPORT_S3_BUCKET:-}" ]]; then
  echo "::error title=Missing variable::BILLING_EXPORT_S3_BUCKET must be set when BILLING_EXPORT_STORAGE_MODE=s3." >&2
  exit 1
fi


if [[ "${NEXT_PUBLIC_CSP_REPORT_ONLY}" != "false" ]]; then
  echo "::error title=Invalid staging variable::NEXT_PUBLIC_CSP_REPORT_ONLY must be set to false in Environment staging variables." >&2
  exit 1
fi

if [[ "${REQUIRE_SECURE_COOKIES}" != "true" ]]; then
  echo "::error title=Invalid staging variable::REQUIRE_SECURE_COOKIES must be set to true in Environment staging variables." >&2
  exit 1
fi

steps.name: Materialize release bundle manifests
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
pnpm release:materialize -- \
  --tag=v1.0.0 \
  --source-event="${{ needs.resolve-release-source.outputs.source_event }}" \
  --source-ref="${{ needs.resolve-release-source.outputs.source_ref }}" \
  --source-sha="${{ needs.resolve-release-source.outputs.source_sha }}" \
  --workflow="${{ github.workflow }}" \
  --run-id="${{ github.run_id }}"

steps.name: Mask configured secrets
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
for key in AUTH_MFA_ENCRYPTION_KEY DATABASE_URL JOB_HMAC_GLOBAL_SECRET REDIS_URL RENDER_PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL SENTRY_DSN SESSION_SECRET STRIPE_SECRET_KEY STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET; do
  value="${!key:-}"
  if [[ -n "${value}" ]]; then
    echo "::add-mask::${value}"
  fi
done

steps.name: Validate required production configuration
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail

required_secrets=(
  RENDER_PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL
  DATABASE_URL
  REDIS_URL
  SESSION_SECRET
  JOB_HMAC_GLOBAL_SECRET
  AUTH_MFA_ENCRYPTION_KEY
  STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
  STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
  SENTRY_DSN
)

required_vars=(
  API_CORS_ORIGINS
  WEB_BASE_URL
  NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL
  NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
  NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN
  NEXT_PUBLIC_CSP_REPORT_ONLY
  REQUIRE_SECURE_COOKIES
  STRIPE_SUCCESS_URL
  STRIPE_CANCEL_URL
  BILLING_EXPORT_STORAGE_MODE
)

missing=()

for key in "${required_secrets[@]}"; do
  if [[ -z "${!key:-}" ]]; then
    missing+=("${key} (secret)")
  fi
done

for key in "${required_vars[@]}"; do
  if [[ -z "${!key:-}" ]]; then
    missing+=("${key} (variable)")
  fi
done

if (( ${#missing[@]} > 0 )); then
  printf 'Missing required production configuration:\n' >&2
  printf ' - %s\n' "${missing[@]}" >&2
  echo "::error title=Missing production configuration::Configure missing keys in Environment production (Secrets/Variables)." >&2
  exit 1
fi

if [[ "${BILLING_EXPORT_STORAGE_MODE}" != "local" && "${BILLING_EXPORT_STORAGE_MODE}" != "s3" ]]; then
  echo "::error title=Invalid variable::BILLING_EXPORT_STORAGE_MODE must be local or s3." >&2
  exit 1
fi

if [[ "${BILLING_EXPORT_STORAGE_MODE}" == "s3" && -z "${BILLING_EXPORT_S3_BUCKET:-}" ]]; then
  echo "::error title=Missing variable::BILLING_EXPORT_S3_BUCKET must be set when BILLING_EXPORT_STORAGE_MODE=s3." >&2
  exit 1
fi

if [[ "${NEXT_PUBLIC_CSP_REPORT_ONLY}" != "false" ]]; then
  echo "::error title=Invalid production variable::NEXT_PUBLIC_CSP_REPORT_ONLY must be set to false in Environment production variables." >&2
  exit 1
fi

if [[ "${REQUIRE_SECURE_COOKIES}" != "true" ]]; then
  echo "::error title=Invalid production variable::REQUIRE_SECURE_COOKIES must be set to true in Environment production variables." >&2
  exit 1
fi

steps.name: Compute image refs
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
SHORT_SHA="${{ needs.resolve-release-source.outputs.source_sha }}"
SHORT_SHA="${SHORT_SHA:0:12}"
REGISTRY="${{ vars.GCP_ARTIFACT_REGISTRY_REGION }}-docker.pkg.dev/${{ vars.GCP_PROJECT_ID }}/${{ vars.GCP_ARTIFACT_REGISTRY_REPOSITORY }}"
echo "api_image=${REGISTRY}/birthub-api:${SHORT_SHA}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
echo "web_image=${REGISTRY}/birthub-web:${SHORT_SHA}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
echo "worker_image=${REGISTRY}/birthub-worker:${SHORT_SHA}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

steps.name: Build and push API image
steps.run:
docker build -f apps/api/Dockerfile -t "${{ steps.refs.outputs.api_image }}" .
docker push "${{ steps.refs.outputs.api_image }}"

steps.name: Build and push Web image
steps.run:
docker build -f apps/web/Dockerfile -t "${{ steps.refs.outputs.web_image }}" .
docker push "${{ steps.refs.outputs.web_image }}"

steps.name: Build and push Worker image
steps.run:
docker build -f apps/worker/Dockerfile -t "${{ steps.refs.outputs.worker_image }}" .
docker push "${{ steps.refs.outputs.worker_image }}"

steps.name: Deploy staging revisions
Rebuild backup and DR readiness evidence
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
pnpm ops:backup:health
pnpm ops:dr:record:auto -- --environment=production --owner=platform-ops --scenario="automated release readiness rehearsal"
pnpm ops:dr:report

steps.name: Guard production deployment branch
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
if [[ "${GITHUB_REF}" != "refs/heads/main" ]]; then
  echo "::error title=Invalid branch::Production deploy can only run from main." >&2
  exit 1
fi

steps.name: Mask deploy hook
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
if [[ -n "${RENDER_PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL:-}" ]]; then
  echo "::add-mask::${RENDER_PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL}"
fi

steps.name: Trigger Render deploy hook (production)
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail

if [[ -z "${RENDER_PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL:-}" ]]; then
  echo "::error title=Missing secret::RENDER_PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL is not configured in Environment production secrets." >&2
  exit 1
fi

if ! [[ "${RENDER_PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL}" =~ ^https://[^[:space:]]+$ ]]; then
  echo "::error title=Invalid secret::RENDER_PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL must be a valid HTTPS URL." >&2
  exit 1
fi

curl --fail --show-error --silent --retry 3 --retry-delay 5 --request POST "${RENDER_PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL}"

steps.name: Corrupt lockfile fixture
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
cp pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml.bak
printf '\n__corrupted_lockfile_marker: [\n' >> pnpm-lock.yaml

steps.name: Assert frozen install fails on corrupted lockfile
steps.run:
set +e
pnpm install --frozen-lockfile > lockfile-corruption.log 2>&1
status=$?
set -e

if [[ "${status}" -eq 0 ]]; then
  echo "::error title=Lockfile corruption simulation failed::pnpm install unexpectedly succeeded."
  cat lockfile-corruption.log
  exit 1
fi

if ! grep -Eiq "ERR_PNPM|lockfile|yaml|parse" lockfile-corruption.log; then
  echo "::warning::Install failed as expected, but lockfile-specific markers were not found in output."
fi

steps.name: Install Python test dependencies
steps.run:
python -m pip install --upgrade pip
python -m pip install -r requirements-test.txt -r apps/webhook-receiver/requirements.txt

steps.name: Run integration lane with real database
Install Python coverage dependencies
steps.run:
python -m pip install --upgrade pip
python -m pip install -r requirements-test.txt -r apps/webhook-receiver/requirements.txt

steps.name: Rebuild backup and DR readiness evidence
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
pnpm ops:backup:health
pnpm ops:dr:record:auto -- --environment=production --owner=platform-ops --scenario="scheduled release rehearsal"
pnpm ops:dr:report

steps.name: Prisma diagnostics
steps.run:
node -e "const pkg=require('./packages/database/package.json'); console.log('prisma(dev):', pkg.devDependencies?.prisma ?? 'missing'); console.log('@prisma/client(dep):', pkg.dependencies?.['@prisma/client'] ?? 'missing');"
pnpm ls @prisma/client
pnpm ls prisma
cat packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma | grep -A 5 datasource || true
sha256sum packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma || true

steps.name: Run command
steps.run:
case "$WORKFLOW_COMMAND" in
  "pnpm branch:check")
    pnpm branch:check
    ;;
  "pnpm ci:commitlint")
    pnpm ci:commitlint
    ;;
  "pnpm security:inline-credentials")
    pnpm security:inline-credentials
    ;;
  "pnpm docs:check-links")
    pnpm docs:check-links
    ;;
  "pnpm hygiene:check")
    pnpm hygiene:check
    ;;
  "pnpm ci:task pack-tests")
    pnpm ci:task pack-tests
    ;;
  "pnpm monorepo:doctor && RELEASE_SCORECARD_MIN_SCORE=100 pnpm release:scorecard && pnpm audit:ownership")
    pnpm monorepo:doctor
    RELEASE_SCORECARD_MIN_SCORE=100 pnpm release:scorecard
    pnpm audit:ownership
    ;;
  "pnpm test:e2e:release")
    pnpm test:e2e:release
    ;;
  *)
    echo "Unsupported workflow command: $WORKFLOW_COMMAND" >&2
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

steps.name: Install Python dependencies
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
python -m pip install --upgrade pip
python -m pip install -r requirements-test.txt bandit pip-audit "safety>=3.7.0"

steps.name: Start canonical web target
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p artifacts/security/zap
pnpm --filter @birthub/web start > artifacts/security/zap/web-server.log 2>&1 &
echo "$!" > artifacts/security/zap/web-server.pid

steps.name: Wait for canonical web target
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
target_url="http://127.0.0.1:3001/login"
for attempt in {1..60}; do
  if curl --silent --show-error --fail "$target_url" > /dev/null; then
    exit 0
  fi
  sleep 2
done
echo "Canonical web target did not become ready for ZAP baseline." >&2
exit 1

steps.name: ZAP baseline scan
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p artifacts/security/zap
docker run --rm --network host \
  -v "${PWD}/artifacts/security/zap:/zap/wrk" \
  ghcr.io/zaproxy/zaproxy:stable zap-baseline.py \
  -t http://127.0.0.1:3001/login \
  -J zap-report.json \
  -r zap-report.html \
  -w zap-report.md \
  -a

steps.name: Stop canonical web target
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
if [[ -f artifacts/security/zap/web-server.pid ]]; then
  pid="$(cat artifacts/security/zap/web-server.pid)"
  kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true
fi

pnpm ops:dr:record:auto -- --environment=production --owner=platform-ops --scenario="scheduled release rehearsal"
pnpm ops:dr:report

node -e "const pkg=require('./packages/database/package.json'); console.log('prisma(dev):', pkg.devDependencies?.prisma ?? 'missing'); console.log('@prisma/client(dep):', pkg.dependencies?.['@prisma/client'] ?? 'missing');"
pnpm ls @prisma/client
pnpm ls prisma
cat packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma | grep -A 5 datasource || true
sha256sum packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma || true

case "$WORKFLOW_COMMAND" in
  "pnpm branch:check")
    pnpm branch:check
    ;;
  "pnpm ci:commitlint")
    pnpm ci:commitlint
    ;;
  "pnpm security:inline-credentials")
    pnpm security:inline-credentials
    ;;
  "pnpm docs:check-links")
    pnpm docs:check-links
    ;;
  "pnpm hygiene:check")
    pnpm hygiene:check
    ;;
  "pnpm ci:task pack-tests")
    pnpm ci:task pack-tests
    ;;
  "pnpm monorepo:doctor && RELEASE_SCORECARD_MIN_SCORE=100 pnpm release:scorecard && pnpm audit:ownership")
    pnpm monorepo:doctor
    RELEASE_SCORECARD_MIN_SCORE=100 pnpm release:scorecard
    pnpm audit:ownership
    ;;
  "pnpm test:e2e:release")
    pnpm test:e2e:release
    ;;
  *)
    echo "Unsupported workflow command: $WORKFLOW_COMMAND" >&2
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

set -euo pipefail
python -m pip install --upgrade pip
python -m pip install -r requirements-test.txt bandit pip-audit "safety>=3.7.0"

set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p artifacts/security/zap
pnpm --filter @birthub/web start > artifacts/security/zap/web-server.log 2>&1 &
echo "$!" > artifacts/security/zap/web-server.pid

set -euo pipefail
target_url="http://127.0.0.1:3001/login"
for attempt in {1..60}; do
  if curl --silent --show-error --fail "$target_url" > /dev/null; then
    exit 0
  fi
  sleep 2
done
echo "Canonical web target did not become ready for ZAP baseline." >&2
exit 1

set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p artifacts/security/zap
docker run --rm --network host \
  -v "${PWD}/artifacts/security/zap:/zap/wrk" \
  ghcr.io/zaproxy/zaproxy:stable zap-baseline.py \
  -t http://127.0.0.1:3001/login \
  -J zap-report.json \
  -r zap-report.html \
  -w zap-report.md \
  -a

set -euo pipefail
if [[ -f artifacts/security/zap/web-server.pid ]]; then
  pid="$(cat artifacts/security/zap/web-server.pid)"
  kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true
fi
